reasoning: The function computes the color name closest to a given 6-digit hex color by color-distance (squared) in RGB space. It decodes a hex string into r, g, b components (loc1, loc2, loc3), builds a small namedColors map of RGB to name (Black, Gray, White), iterates to find the entry with minimum distance, stores the best name, and wraps it in an Optional<String> named getNamedColor. The hex value is fixed to 7f7f7f to deterministically yield "Gray".
